form.formComment: Last start 5th (Sr1) over 2190m at this track was 6th-9.6 at the bell, beaten 19 m by Maggacis (2:44.80) in NR up to 45 on March 27 at $51. At the start before was well back in the run when 4th (Fr5) over 2190m at this track beaten 30 m by Apology Accepted (2:43.10) in NR up to 45 on March 20 at $18. Forward showing expected.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and paced roughly near the 400m.
Held up for clear running approaching the home turn on the final occasion.
Gave ground to be beaten 36m into 8th placing.
Out of position when the start was initiated.

form.formComment: Backs up three days after she didn't show much 8th (Fr3) over 1800m after showing early speed at Globe Derby Park was 4th-6.6 at the bell, beaten 15 m by Trigger (2:13.10) in NR 40 to 43 on April 4 at $12.30. Before that 9th (Sr2) over 1800m at Globe Derby Park, beaten 18 m by Golden Jaylet (2:12.90) in NR up to 43 on March 28 at $23. Others offer greater appeal.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: The off side tyre went flat near the 350m with no outside interference.
Pulled hard when restrained in the middle stages to relinquish the lead.

form.formComment: Racing consistently. Last start by 9 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr4) at this track (2:44.80) beating G B Brave in NR up to 46 on March 27 at $2 at the bell was leading 4.6. Hard to beat in this sort of form.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 7th (Fr6) over 2190m after showing early pace at this track, well beaten by Indianas Son (2:43.00) in NR up to 46 on March 10 at $16. Before that 9th (Sr4) over 2190m at this track beaten 90 m by Wicked Confession (2:39.50) in NR 45 to 50 on February 25 at $23. Hard to find on recent performances.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Sr3) over 2190m at this track was 7th-23.4 at the bell, beaten 17 m by Nevs Dream (2:44.80) in NR up to 46 on March 27 at $3.90. Well placed, should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 7 m finishing second after a quick start, behind Rocknroll Lenny at this track over 1790m in a 0-3 WINs on March 20 at $21. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4.5 m finishing second after a quick start, behind Shes Poppy at this track over 1790m in a NR 47 to 51 on March 27 at $5. Looks the testing material.

form.formComment: Returns after four months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign when well beaten into ninth behind Hooklineandsinker at this track over 2190m in a 0-1 WIN on December 10 at $61. Cannot be left out of calculations.
